mapper.update: UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, type, title, content, is_read, extra_data, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, 0, #{extraData}, NOW())
